articles.headline: Delhi AQI remains in 'very poor' category
articles.summary: Residents brace for another week of hazardous air as stubble burning and winter inversion persist across the NCR.

articles.headline: AAP promises expanded mohalla clinics ahead of polls
articles.summary: The ruling party doubles down on primary healthcare as a signature achievement in the capital.

articles.headline: Delhi Metro Phase IV corridor work advances
articles.summary: New lines aim to connect outer districts with faster commutes for lakhs of daily riders.

articles.headline: Yamuna water levels draw scrutiny after summer shortage
articles.summary: Neighbourhoods in East and North East Delhi report intermittent supply cuts.

articles.headline: BJP rallies in Delhi ahead of municipal coordination talks
articles.summary: Centre-state tensions remain a talking point as parties position for the next election cycle.
